parameters.rawBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({"contents": [{"parts": [{"text": `You are an elite literary analyst, a world-class storyteller, and an expert in human psychology.
I am providing you with the full text of a public domain book.
Your task is to read the ENTIRE book and generate a masterclass-level, 10,000-word deep-dive analysis.

# TONE & STYLE:
- Write like a mix of Robert Greene, Malcolm Gladwell, and Morgan Housel.
- Highly engaging, punchy, thought-provoking, and deeply insightful.
- Use HTML formatting (<b>, <blockquote>, <ul>, etc.) where appropriate to enhance the reading experience.
- Analyze the psychology, the hidden themes, the historical context, and how the reader can apply these lessons today.

Please provide the output EXACTLY as a JSON object with the following keys:

{
"title": "Exact Title",
"author": "Exact Author",
"year": 1900,
"one_liner_hook": "Create a hyper-engaging, emotional or curiosity-inducing single sentence about the book.",
"why_it_matters": "2-3 paragraphs making a compelling absolute case why the modern reader NEEDS to read this analysis.",
"chapter_breakdowns": [{ "chapter": "Catchy Title for the Theme/Chapter", "key_idea": "Summarize the key idea.", "impact": "Around 800-1000 words of deeply engaging text analyzing this chapter/theme." }],
"best_ideas": ["Idea 1", "Idea 2"],
"quotes": [{ "quote": "...", "commentary": "..."}],
"criticism": "Honest critique",
"verdict": "Final verdict",
"actionable_takeaways": ["Takeaway 1"]
}

Text chunk:
` + ($json.data ? $json.data.substring(0, 1000000) : 'None')}]}  ], "generationConfig": {"response_mime_type": "application/json"}}) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ia_identifier: $('Split Books').item.json.identifier, title: $json.title, author: $json.author, publication_year: parseInt($json.year) || 0, one_liner_hook: $json.one_liner_hook, why_it_matters: $json.why_it_matters, chapter_breakdowns: $json.chapter_breakdowns, best_ideas: $json.best_ideas, quotes: $json.quotes, criticism: $json.criticism, verdict: $json.verdict, actionable_takeaways: $json.actionable_takeaways }) }}
